response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and systems software developer with a strong web and application engineering background, but he lacks virtually every core technical competency required for this role. The position demands deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD design, and deep-learning workload performance analysis — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. His closest relevant experience is low-latency application development using async I/O and DLang at Dunnhumby, but that is application-layer performance tuning, not hardware-level architectural work. There is no indication of any AI/ML, hardware-software co-design, or silicon modeling experience.
strengths: 15+ years of continuous software engineering experience across diverse systems, meeting the BS+8yr minimum education/experience threshold
Demonstrated low-latency and high-throughput systems work (millions of HTTP req/s, async I/O, fiber-based concurrency at Dunnhumby)
Breadth across embedded, mobile, backend, and infrastructure (Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD), showing systems-level awareness
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, SIMD/MIMD architectures, GPU workload analysis, or any hardware-level performance architecture
No AI/ML or deep-learning background whatsoever — the core domain of the role is entirely absent from the resume
Career trajectory is firmly in web/application software; nothing signals a path toward or interest in hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP or hardware modeling experience
